General.Name: Intertainment AG
General.Description: Intertainment AG engages in the acquisition and exploitation of film rights in Europe. It also trades in film licenses; and produces, co-produces, and merchandizes films. In addition, the company distributes its films through various distribution channels, such as cinema, DVD, Pay-TV, and free-TV. The company was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Feldafing, Germany.

0.Name: Mr. Felix  Petri
0.Title: CEO & Chairman of the Management Board
